title: Production Support Main Skill
summary: Privacy-safe production log investigation. Takes the structured scan plan from production-support-plan as its guide: seeds keywords from COMMON_ERROR_WORDS and incident domain, LLM self-filters extracted identifiers via guess_pattern(), expands keywords from local code, runs N×M parallel async log scans, correlates hit timestamps, and produces a root-cause incident summary with traced URLs.
author: Platform Engineering
referencedQueries: log scan for ISIN or order ID
LLM token extraction from user query
knowledgeGraph:
graph TD
  A[Scan Plan] --> B[Step 1: Build Keywords]
  B --> C[Step 2: Run Scanner]
  C --> D{New entities?}
  D -->|yes| B
  D -->|no| E[Step 3: Interpret + Summarize]
  E --> F[Root Cause + Timeline + Traced URLs]
